# Pull Request

## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] docs: Documentation
- [ ] test: Tests
- [ ] refactor: Code refactoring
- [ ] chore: Maintenance

## Quality Gates

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Engineering Report completed (if phase-level change)

## Scientific Impact

- [ ] No scientific impact
- [ ] Changes to scientific constants (requires ADR update)
- [ ] Changes to measurement pipeline (requires ADR + validation)
- [ ] New calibration logic (requires ADR + cross-device testing)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No `any` types introduced
- [ ] No hardcoded scientific constants

## Related Issues

Closes #
